'''Dra III''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Wyl sector/Legends|Wyl sector]] that was known for its dangerous wildlife. [[Groundquake/Legends|Groundquakes]] and severe storms were commonplace on Dra III, and the weather, combined with high [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]], created strong and powerful fauna. Sport hunters frequently visited the world looking for trophies—the six-legged predator known as the [[nashtah]] was the most famous of Dra III's native beasts, and was sometimes used as guard beasts offworld.

==Description==
A [[Mountain/Legends|mountainous]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]], Dra III was located in the [[Wyl sector/Legends|Wyl sector's]] [[Dra system/Legends|Dra system]], on the very edge of the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] along the [[Authority Guardian Corridor]]. Dra III was constantly racked by [[Groundquake/Legends|groundquakes]] and [[Hurricane/Legends|hurricanes]],<ref name="atlas" /> and its high [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] resulted in heavy and strong inhabitants.<ref name="cswe" /> Dra III's perilous and chaotic weather produced similarly dangerous wildlife, and the world was renowned for its dangerous and uncontrollable beasts. The most well-known of Dra III's fauna was the [[nashtah]], also known as the Dravian hound, as it was the only of the world's native animals to ever be domesticated. Tireless six-[[Limb/Legends|legged]] predators, nashtahs were sometimes seen in the wider [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] as guard beasts for gangsters.<ref name="hsc" /> [[Cal-serpent]]s and [[fullor]]s also stalked Dra III's landscape, themselves keeping to the [[Forest/Legends|forests]] and plains.<ref name="atlas" />

==History==
During the later [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Dra III was visited by the famed Republic [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Barosa Warren]], who received a scar on his right arm from a nashtah attack on the planet.<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> By the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] the planet had become renowned as a destination for sport hunting due to its dangerous local wildlife,<ref name="atlas" /> and had produced one export: the [[Kell Arms Corporation|Kell]] [[Kell Mark II heavy assault rifle|Mark II heavy assault rifle]], a powerful, yet outdated firearm.<ref name="cswe" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dra III was first mentioned in ''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'', a novel written by [[Brian Daley]] and released in [[1979]].<ref name="hsr">''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]''</ref>
